headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Eastern Caribbean Ports
paragraph: Today, St. Thomas faces the most significant weather challenges with sustained winds reaching 17 knots and wave heights up to 6.2 feet from an east-southeast swell direction. Rain probability is very high at 98 percent, while nearby St. Maarten experiences stronger winds up to 20 knots, indicating unsettled conditions across key Eastern Caribbean cruise ports.
